eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on the next Senate Majority Leader reflects a closely contested 2026 midterm landscape, where Republicans currently hold the majority under Leader John Thune but defend 22 seats to Democrats' 13, creating multiple paths for a Democratic flip that favors Minority Leader Chuck Schumer at 35.5%. Thune trails closely at 30.5% amid GOP internal criticism from conservatives questioning his leadership effectiveness, while Brian Schatz's 12.5% share signals potential Democratic caucus challenges to Schumer. Recent Democratic recruiting setbacks, including Maine Gov. Janet Mills' abrupt withdrawal on April 30 after a public meltdown, have intensified scrutiny of Schumer's strategy and capped his edge. Key developments like primaries, retirements, polling shifts in battleground states, or party whip counts could widen the gap before the November 3 election.

markets.question: Will Gardner Minshew start Week 1 for the Chiefs in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the listed player who is the starting quarterback for the Kansas City Chiefs in their Week 1 regular season game of the 2026-2027 NFL season.

If the Chiefs do not name a single player as the starting quarterback, the market will resolve based on the player who takes the most snaps at quarterback during their first offensive drive of the game. If multiple players take the same number of snaps on the Chiefs’ first offensive drive, the market will resolve to the player who took the first snap at quarterback.

This market may not resolve before the start of the Chiefs’ Week 1 regular season game. 

The resolution sources for this market will be official information from the NFL (NFL.com); however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Will US crude oil reserves fall to 325M by June 5?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the U.S. Energy Information Administration publishes a weekly figure for U.S. Ending Stocks of Crude Oil in the Strategic Petroleum Reserve less than or equal to the specified value for any week ending on or before June 5, 2026. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market will resolve as soon as the listed value is reached, or once data has been released for the final week ending on or before June 5, 2026, and the listed value has not been reached.

If data has not been released for the final week ending on or before June 5 2026, by June 12, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve based on the data available at that time.

The primary resolution source for this market will be the U.S. Energy Information Administration, specifically the weekly data published for the U.S. Ending Stocks of Crude Oil in the Strategic Petroleum Reserve at https://www.eia.gov/dnav/pet/hist/LeafHandler.ashx?n=PET&s=WCSSTUS1&f=W.

Note: this market’s resolution source publishes weekly values of U.S. Ending Stocks of Crude Oil in the Strategic Petroleum Reserve in thousands of barrels. Thus, this will be the level of specificity used to resolve this market.

eventMetadata.context_description: US commercial crude oil inventories fell sharply by 6.2 million barrels to 459.5 million barrels in the week ending April 24, 1% above the five-year average, driven by surging exports and steady refinery inputs averaging 16.1 million barrels per day amid product draws in gasoline and distillate fuels. Elevated Brent crude prices near $115 per barrel, fueled by Middle East supply disruptions including Strait of Hormuz tensions, have tightened global balances, with EIA forecasting a peak in 2Q26. Approaching summer driving season post-Memorial Day will likely boost demand, pressuring stocks lower, while rising US rig counts signal production growth. Traders monitor weekly EIA petroleum status reports through early June for builds or further draws ahead of the June 5 snapshot.

markets.question: Will S&P 500 (SPX) hit $8,200 (HIGH) in December?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point between market creation and market close on the final day of trading for December 2026, any 1-minute candle for S&P 500 (SPX) shows a final "High" price equal to or above the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No."

All prices recorded during regular trading hours of the primary exchange for the instrument, as reflected in Yahoo Finance's 1-minute interval ("1m") data, will be considered.

Periods when the market is officially closed (e.g., holidays or maintenance breaks) will not be considered.

All times referenced are local to the primary exchange on which the index trades.

The resolution source for this market is Yahoo Finance — specifically, the 1-minute interval ("1m") chart data for S&P 500 (SPX) available at https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/%5EGSPC/.

markets.question: Abstract FDV above $200M one day after launch?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Fully Diluted Valuation of Abstract's governance token is greater than the value specified in the title 1 day after launch. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No."

The token must be actively, publicly transferable and tradable to be considered a launch.

The FDV will be determined using the total token supply multiplied by the token price.

"1 day after launch" is defined as 4:00 PM ET on the calendar day following launch. The resolution source for this market is the most liquid price source available. If Abstract doesn't launch a token by December 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Madrid be 24°C on May 3?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Adolfo Suárez Madrid-Barajas Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 3 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Adolfo Suárez Madrid-Barajas Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/es/madrid/LEMD.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: AEMET's latest forecast for Madrid on May 3 pins the maximum temperature at 20°C at Adolfo Suárez Madrid-Barajas Airport, fueling the 98% market-implied probability for 21°C as traders align with live observations already hitting 21°C amid southwesterly winds at 20 km/h and partial clearing after morning showers. This positioning reflects strong consensus from ECMWF and GFS models showing peak afternoon highs in the 20-21°C range under mostly cloudy skies with 55% rain chance, cooler than May's typical 22°C average due to an unstable Atlantic pattern. Realistic challenges include prolonged sunshine pushing toward 22°C or persistent clouds capping below 21°C; final airport readings later today will resolve the market.

markets.question: Will Pablo Lopez win the 2026 AL Cy Young Award?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the player who wins the 2026 American League Cy Young Award.

In the event of a tie, this market will resolve according to the official winner as determined by MLB rules. If multiple winners are announced then this market will resolve to the player whose listed last name comes first alphabetically.

If the 2026 MLB season is cancelled, postponed after December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, or there is otherwise no winner declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from Major League Baseball; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Early-season pitching dominance across the American League has kept the 2026 AL Cy Young race tightly contested, with Tarik Skubal holding a slim trader consensus edge at 21.5% implied probability as the defending two-time winner boasting a 2.70 ERA and 0.95 WHIP through seven starts. Cleveland Guardians rookie Parker Messick has surged to 18.9% on a breakout April capped by the Pitch Hand Award, a 1.73 ERA, and near-no-hitter, while New York Yankees prospect Cam Schlittler tops MLB ERA leaderboards to fuel his 12.7% share. Jose Soriano's recent poll-leading form and Dylan Cease's strikeout prowess add volatility in this small-sample stretch, underscoring the wisdom of crowds pricing multiple sub-3.00 ERA rotations amid no major injury disruptions.

Jordan holds a slim lead in trader consensus for People's Sexiest Man Alive 2026 at 21.8% implied probability, propelled by his fresh Best Actor Oscar win for Sinners and high-profile CinemaCon appearance promoting Swapped, reinforcing his enduring Hollywood charisma since his 2020 title. Bad Bunny trails closely at 17.5% on lingering Super Bowl halftime show buzz, while Timothée Chalamet (14%) and Ryan Gosling (10%) draw from packed slates including Dune: Part Three and Project Hail Mary's box office dominance. With no outcome above 22%, markets reflect fragmented sentiment balancing awards prestige, streaming traction, and cultural heartthrob narratives ahead of the fall announcement.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket overwhelmingly favors a high temperature of 66°F or higher in Austin on May 4 (99.7% implied probability), aligned with the latest National Weather Service forecasts projecting 82–85°F under partly cloudy skies and light southerly winds. This positioning stems from a building ridge of high pressure over Texas following recent drying after early May showers, with model consensus from GFS and ECMWF ensembles showing robust warming and near-zero precipitation odds. Austin's May climatology—averaging 84°F highs—provides strong historical precedent, as daily maxima below 66°F occur less than 1% of the time. Realistic challenges include an unforeseen northerly wind shift or isolated thunderstorm capping temperatures, though current guidance indicates minimal risk; watch the NWS 4 p.m. CDT update for refinements.

markets.question: Will the Democratic Party win the IL-09 House seat?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the party of the candidate who wins the IL-09 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The midterm elections will take place on November 4, 2026.

​A candidate's party will be determined by their ballot-listed or otherwise identifiable affiliation with that party at the time all of the 2026 House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources. A candidate without a ballot-listed affiliation to either the Democrat or Republican parties will be considered a member of one of these parties based on the party with which they most recently expressed their intent to caucus at the time all of the House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources.

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the United States government, specifically the Federal Election Commission (https://www.fec.gov/).

eventMetadata.context_description: Illinois' 9th Congressional District, a longtime Democratic stronghold with a partisan voting index exceeding D+20, favors Democratic nominee Daniel Biss following his victory in the crowded March 17 primary over 15 challengers, solidifying party support in the wake of Rep. Jan Schakowsky's retirement. Biss enters the November 3 general election with strong fundraising—over $250,000 banked in early April—and endorsements, contrasting weak Republican nominee John Elleson, a pastor with limited resources in a district last won by a GOP candidate decades ago. Trader consensus prices a Democratic victory at 92.5%, reflecting historical margins and low GOP turnout. Upsets remain possible via a major Biss scandal, national Republican midterm wave, or voting irregularities, though barriers are high.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket reflects tight uncertainty in forecast models for Helsinki's highest temperature at Vantaa Airport on May 4, with 11°C leading at 30% amid a cluster around 9–12°C, driven by the Finnish Meteorological Institute's latest runs showing daytime highs of 9–10°C under cloudy skies, light winds (2–5 m/s westerly), and low precipitation risk. markets.question: Will Airbnb, Inc. (ABNB) hit (LOW) $116 in May?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during May 2026, any 1-minute candle for Airbnb, Inc. (ABNB) has a final "Low" price equal to or below the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Airbnb, Inc. (ABNB) "Low" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.ABNB%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.ABNB%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily low price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

events.title: What will Airbnb, Inc. (ABNB) hit in May 2026?
events.description: What will Airbnb, Inc. (ABNB) hit in May 2026?

eventMetadata.context_description: Airbnb (ABNB) shares trade around $142, up 12% over the past month and near the 52-week high of $147, fueled by optimism ahead of the Q1 2026 earnings release on May 7. Q4 2025 results showed revenue growth accelerating to 12% year-over-year at $2.78 billion, beating estimates despite an EPS miss at $0.56, with full-year revenue reaching $12.2 billion on robust gross bookings and nights booked expansion. Analyst consensus rates the stock overweight with an average 12-month price target of $150, reflecting expectations for continued travel demand recovery and AI-driven innovations. Q1 guidance of $2.59–$2.63 billion revenue (14–16% growth) sets the bar; outperformance or upbeat Q2 outlook could propel shares higher by May's end, while softening occupancy or macro headwinds pose risks.

markets.question: Spread: Cultural y Deportiva Leonesa (-2.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming La Liga 2 game, scheduled for May 9 at 10:15 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Cultural y Deportiva Leonesa" if Cultural y Deportiva Leonesa win the game by 3 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Albacete Balompié".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on laliga.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Albacete Balompié vs. Cultural y Deportiva Leonesa - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the La Liga 2 game, scheduled for May 9 at 10:15 AM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Albacete Balompié hosts relegation-battling Cultural y Deportiva Leonesa in LaLiga 2 on May 9 at Estadio Carlos Belmonte, with trader consensus likely favoring the mid-table hosts due to home advantage and Leonesa's dismal form. Leonesa sit 22nd after recent defeats, including 2-1 at Mirandés on April 26, 1-2 home loss to Córdoba on April 18, and 1-0 at Granada on April 12, leaving them desperate for points in a must-win survival push amid their 8-8-20 record. Albacete, 13th in the table, lost 0-3 at Eibar on April 24 but won 4-1 versus Granada prior, showing attacking threat at home. Head-to-head history tilts toward Leonesa with two prior wins and three draws, though low-scoring (0.8 goals average); no major injuries reported, but long-term absences like Albacete's Antonio Puertas persist. Late-season stakes heighten upset potential for the visitors.

markets.question: Will Real Sporting de Gijon achieve promotion from LALIGA 2 to LALIGA for the 2026-27 season?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the listed team achieves promotion from LALIGA 2 to LALIGA for the 2026–27 season at the conclusion of the current league season. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

Official promotion is defined as a team clinching a place in LALIGA for the 2026–27 season through their final standing in the LALIGA 2, via playoff victory, or by any other official league decision recognized by LALIGA and LALIGA 2.

If the 2026 LALIGA 2 season is cancelled, postponed after June 12, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, or there are no teams confirmed for promotion within that timeframe, the corresponding market will “No”.

The primary resolution source will be official announcements from LALIGA and LALIGA 2. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Racing Santander clings to a one-point lead over Deportivo La Coruña in the LaLiga Hypermotion table after matchday 38, with UD Almería two points adrift in third—all three holding strong goal differences amid a fiercely contested race for the two automatic promotion spots to LaLiga ahead of the May 31 finale. Recent results like Deportivo's 2-1 win over Leganés on May 1 and Racing's solid home record (72% points share) have sustained the tension, while CD Castellón (64 points), Málaga CF, and UD Las Palmas occupy playoff berths for the third spot. Key upcoming factors include games in hand for leaders, favorable matchups like Racing's home clash versus bottom-side Huesca, and recent form edges for Deportivo, underscoring the unpredictable final stretch.

This market will resolve to the player who wins the 2026 American League Rookie of the Year award for the 2026 MLB Season.

eventMetadata.context_description: Tigers shortstop Kevin McGonigle leads AL Rookie of the Year trader consensus at 38.5% implied probability, edging White Sox first baseman Munetaka Murakami's 36%, as both deliver standout early-season performances through 30 games. McGonigle tops AL rookies in batting average (.333), on-base percentage (.420), slugging (.518), hits, doubles, and triples, bolstered by a 12-game hit streak and 25 consecutive games reaching base, giving him a WAR edge around 2.0. Murakami counters with explosive power, tying the MLB home run lead at 11—including a three-run shot on May 1—and a 1.020 OPS despite a .256 average, fueling recent odds flips amid voter appeal for counting stats like homers and RBI. The bunched odds reflect traders' split on well-rounded contact skills versus headline-grabbing slugging in a deep rookie class, with momentum hinging on sustained form, injuries, and schedule strength.

eventMetadata.context_description: Connor McDavid's league-leading 138 points (48 goals, 90 assists), clinching his sixth Art Ross Trophy on April 16, have solidified trader consensus at 49.5% implied probability for the Hart Memorial Trophy, underscoring his unmatched offensive dominance and pivotal role in Edmonton's wins—registering a point in all 41 victories. Nikita Kucherov (130 points in 76 games) and Nathan MacKinnon (127 points, 53 goals earning the Rocket Richard Trophy) trail at 19.2% and 19.0%, reflecting their historic assist and goal totals amid competitive voter polls, though McDavid's edge in total production prevails. markets.question: Will Xi Jinping win the Nobel Peace Prize in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the winner of the 2026 Nobel Peace Prize, as announced by the Norwegian Nobel Committee.

If multiple listed individuals or entities jointly receive the prize, the market will resolve to a single winner. If Donald Trump, Volodymyr Zelenskyy,  Benjamin Netanyahu, Vladimir Putin, or Elon Musk are among the recipients, the market will resolve to the highest-ranked among them in that exact order of precedence. If none of those five are among the winners and the prize is awarded jointly to at least one listed individual and at least one listed organization, the market will resolve in favor of the individual. If no prioritized individuals are among the winners and all listed recipients are of the same type (all individuals or all organizations), the market will resolve to the person whose last name, or the entity’s name, comes first in alphabetical order as listed in this market.

If no official announcement regarding the 2026 Nobel Peace Prize has been made by March 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other."

The resolution source for this market will be the first official announcement from the Norwegian Nobel Committee.

Donald Trump trails closely at 6.5%, buoyed by bookmaker surges like William Hill naming him favorite amid speculation of his inclusion and past Abraham Accords momentum, while Volodymyr Zelenskyy's 6.4% reflects sustained acclaim for Ukraine's defiance. This tight cluster under 8% underscores high uncertainty in the opaque selection process—favoring human rights icons, diplomats, or conflict mediators—with no dominant storyline amid diverse contenders like Pope Leo XIV; watch for summer leaks or breakthroughs as catalysts ahead of the October 9 reveal.

markets.question: Will Anže Logar be the next Prime Minister of Slovenia?
markets.description:
Parliamentary elections are scheduled to be held in Slovenia on March 22, 2026.

This market will resolve to the next individual who is officially elected by the National Assembly (Državni zbor) and sworn in as Prime Minister of Slovenia following the next parliamentary election.

To count for resolution, the individual must be formally sworn in. Any interim or caretaker Prime Minister will not count toward the resolution of this market.

If no such Prime Minister is sworn in by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the Government of Slovenia; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Following Slovenia's closely contested March 2026 parliamentary elections, outgoing Prime Minister Robert Golob's Freedom Movement narrowly led but failed to form a coalition government after weeks of talks, conceding on April 20 and informing President Nataša Pirc Musar. The president declined to nominate a new prime minister-designate on April 25, directing the National Assembly to propose a candidate able to secure a majority. Janez Janša's Slovenian Democratic Party (SDS), the election runner-up with strong right-leaning allies, now leads coalition negotiations, bolstered by his May 2 statement rejecting weak governments and reports of ministry cuts signaling progress—driving trader consensus to an 89% implied probability on Janša. Challengers like Jernej Vrtovec (3.3%) trail due to smaller parliamentary roles and unproven coalition leverage, with resolution hinging on imminent National Assembly votes.

eventMetadata.context_description: AC Milan, sitting second in Serie A standings with 66 points from 33 matches, hold a strong edge over relegation-threatened US Sassuolo, who sit 19th on 18 points after three wins in 33 games. Sassuolo's recent home form offers faint hope, with narrow victories over Cagliari (2-1 on April 4) and Como (April 17) boosting survival chances, but defensive injuries plague them—centre-back Fali Candé (cruciate tear, out until June), left-back Edoardo Pieragnolo (cruciate, May 1), and others like Daniel Boloca sidelined. Milan, healthier after resolving earlier issues, rebounded from losses to Napoli (1-0) and Udinese (0-3) with a 1-0 win at Verona (Rabiot goal), prioritizing Champions League qualification. Head-to-head favors Milan (14 wins to Sassuolo's 8), though Sassuolo's Mapei Stadium home advantage and desperation could spark an upset in this matchday 35 clash on May 3.

markets.question: Will OpenAI have the highest estimated revenue for Apr 27–May 3, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the model family that has the highest total estimated inference revenue based on Anera's data published at https://anera.markets/intelligence/model-family for the specified week.

The week’s values will be determined by summing the respective companies' estimated revenue figures for each day within the specified period. If data for all specified days is not released by 7:00 PM ET on the second day following the final date, this market will resolve based on data available at that time. Entries labeled “Other” will not be considered a model family for the purposes of this market. Revisions to published data will be considered only until all relevant data for the specified period has been released.

Model families will be ranked primarily by their total estimated inference revenue over the specified seven-day period, with alphabetical order of model family names as listed in this market group used as a tiebreaker (e.g., if two model families are exactly tied, “Anthropic” would be ranked ahead of “OpenAI”). This market will resolve based on the model family that occupies first place under this ranking.

The resolution source for this market is data published by Anera Intelligence at https://anera.markets/intelligence/model-family. If the relevant data for the full period is not available by 7:00 PM ET on the second day following the final date, this market will resolve based on data available at that time. If this resolution source is unavailable, this market will remain open until the data becomes available and will resolve based on the first subsequent check.

markets.question: Valorant: Trace Esports vs Dragon Ranger Gaming (BO3) - VCT China Playoffs
markets.description:
This market refers to the Valorant Lower bracket round 1 match between Trace Esports and Dragon Ranger Gaming in the VCT China Playoffs, initially scheduled for May 3 at 7:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Trace Esports" if Trace Esports win the match against Dragon Ranger Gaming.

This market will resolve to "Dragon Ranger Gaming" if Dragon Ranger Gaming win the match against Trace Esports.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://vlr.gg. However, if https://vlr.gg has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

DRG dropped from upper quarterfinals via a competitive 1-2 loss to top seed EDward Gaming on May 2, while Trace fell 0-2 to All Gamers shortly before. Both rosters remain intact amid the Ascent-replacing-Bind map pool; winner advances to face TYLOO in lower quarters, with top-3 Stage 1 finishers qualifying for Masters London. Recent form underscores DRG's momentum in double-elimination contention.

markets.question: Will Reform UK win control of the most London borough councils?
markets.description:
Local elections in London, UK are currently scheduled for May 7, 2026.

This market will resolve according to the party that controls the most London borough councils as a result of this election.

Control is defined as having more than half of the voting councillors of a London borough council. Any executive positions, like Mayor, will not count.

A candidate will be considered an official candidate of a party if they are officially nominated by that party and are registered for the relevant election in affiliation with that party. Independent candidates will not count for any party.

This market's resolution will be based solely on the number of councils controlled by the specified party, not any coalition of which it may be a part. 

In the case of a tie between two or more parties for the greatest number of councils controlled, this market will resolve in favor of the party whose name comes first in alphabetical order, as listed in this market group.

Resolution of this market will be based on the results of the relevant London borough council elections, once those results are official. This market may resolve to the listed party as soon as it becomes mathematically impossible for any other party to equal or surpass its number of councils controlled in these elections. If the results of any of the relevant 2026 London local elections aren’t known by April 30, 2027 11:59 PM ET, the winning party will be determined based on the available results up to that point. If none of the results of the relevant 2026 London local elections are known by that time, this market will resolve to “Other”.

This market will resolve based on the results of the elections as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the respective council government.

eventMetadata.context_description: Labour's 84% implied probability to control the most London borough councils reflects trader consensus from the April 22 YouGov MRP, projecting them as the largest party in 15 of 32 boroughs despite a vote share plunge to 26% amid national government backlash. First-past-the-post dynamics and incumbency in inner strongholds like Newham and Camden preserve their edge, even as fragmentation yields many no-overall-control outcomes. Elections occur May 7, with close races vulnerable to turnout in battleground boroughs.

markets.description:
In the upcoming Copa Sudamericana game, scheduled for April 15 at 6:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Club Independiente Petrolero" if Club Independiente Petrolero win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Caracas FC".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on conmebol.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

Independiente Petrolero, mid-table in Bolivia's Primera División with mixed results such as a recent 0-0 stalemate against Guabirá, brings solid away form but faces travel and adaptation challenges. No major injuries or suspensions reported for either side, and limited head-to-head history leaves the matchup closely contested based on trader consensus, with group positioning implications heightening stakes.

markets.question: Will Girona qualify for the League Phase of the 2026-27 UEFA Champions League?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed team clinches a league phase spot in the 2026-27 Champions League per UEFA rules. Otherwise, the associated market will resolve to "No".

If at any point it becomes impossible for the listed team to clinch a league phase spot in the 2026-27 Champions League (e.g. they cannot mathematically achieve a Champions League place, cannot qualify through play in European or cup competitions, etc.), the associated market will resolve to "No". 

If the 2025-26 LaLiga season is cancelled, postponed after August 31, 2026 11:59 PM ET, or the teams that qualified for the 2026-27 Champions League have not been officially confirmed by UEFA within that timeframe, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source for this market will be official information from UEFA and/or LaLiga; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Will Le Mans FC achieve promotion from Ligue 2 to Ligue 1 for the 2026-27 season?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the listed team achieves promotion from the French Ligue 2 to Ligue 1 for the 2026–27 season at the conclusion of the current league season. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

Official promotion is defined as a team clinching a place in Ligue 1 for the 2026–27 season through their final standing in the Ligue 2, via playoff victory, or by any other official league decision recognized by the Ligue 1 and Ligue 2.

If the 2025-26 Ligue 2 season is cancelled, postponed after June 12, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, or there are no teams confirmed for promotion within that timeframe, the corresponding market will “No”.

The primary resolution source will be official announcements from Ligue 1 and Ligue 2. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

Rodez (55) eyes playoffs alongside Reims (53). Final matchday fixtures, including Le Mans' challenging away clash at relegation-battling Bastia, will settle the promotion race, with 3rd-5th advancing to playoffs versus Ligue 1's 16th for the last spot.

Swing factors include upcoming full rehearsals, semi-final draws (May 12/14), and jury-public splits before the May 16 final.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus heavily favors the Partido Liberal (PL) at 88% implied probability to win the most seats in Brazil's October 4, 2026, Senate election, where two-thirds of the chamber's 81 seats—54 in total—face renewal. This positioning stems from PL's recent surge in state-level activity, including official pre-candidate launches for Senate races in Minas Gerais (Domingos Sávio, backed by Senator Flávio Bolsonaro), Santa Catarina (featuring Carlos Bolsonaro and Caroline de Toni), and Goiás (with NOVO alliance support), signaling strong party unity and Bolsonaro family mobilization amid fragmented center-right competition from UNIÃO, PSD, and others. Concurrent presidential polls showing a tight Lula-Flávio Bolsonaro runoff have amplified right-wing momentum, though PT and smaller parties trail due to weaker slates; late scandals or alliances could still shift dynamics before the vote.

markets.question: Will Trump post "Free Tina Peters" on Truth Social this week?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if @realDonaldTrump posts/truths the listed term between April 27, 2026, 12:00 AM ET and May 3, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

For the purposes of this market, all text posted by the listed account in quote and reply posts/truths count toward a "Yes" resolution, but quoted posts/truths and reposts/reTruths will not count.

Text posted in images, memes, or other non-animated, non-video media that are not strictly text will qualify towards a "Yes" resolution only if the listed term is spelled out clearly and in full. (e.g., words spelled out in a letter posted as a .jpg will qualify, however a word posted as part of an animated .gif will not.)

Any plural or possessive forms of a listed term, as well as variance in capitalizations, will count toward the resolution of this market, regardless of context. Other forms of the listed term will NOT count.

Extraneous symbols being inserted into a word (ex: r@d1cal, for "radical") will disqualify it from counting toward a "Yes" resolution. Sigils at the beginnings of words, such as hashtags, "@" symbols, or denotations of currency, will not disqualify a term from counting towards a "Yes" resolution.

Misspellings or iterations of the listed term, including all grammatical or slang forms, or misspellings with extra, missing, or incorrect letters (ex: helloooooooo or heoll, for ‘hello’), will not count toward a “Yes” resolution, regardless of context or intent.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g. joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

The resolution source for this market will be Donald Trumps's verified Truth Social account: @realDonaldTrump

Please note, only the @realDonaldTrump verified Truth Social account counts for this market, regardless of the URL for this profile. If Donald Trump posts/truths from another account, it has no bearing on the resolution of this market.

Misspellings or iterations of the listed term, including all grammatical or slang forms, or misspellings with extra, missing, or incorrect letters (ex: helloooooooo or heoll, for ‘hello’), will not count toward a “Yes” resolution, regardless of context or intent.

eventMetadata.context_description: President Trump's frequent Truth Social posts this week, spanning April 27 to May 3, have centered on U.S.-Iran tensions, including threats to Iranian power plants and bridges, an AI-generated image of himself with a gun, claims of Iran's collapse, and urgings for a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz following U.S. military rescues. These April 28 and 29 messages, alongside a May 1 media post and surreal content like swimming imagery, reflect his pattern of using the platform for direct foreign policy signaling amid oil price spikes and negotiation reviews. Traders gauge probabilities based on this geopolitical catalyst dominating his output, with May 3 posts potentially decisive for market resolution.

markets.question: Will SpaceX IPO by December 31, 2026?
markets.description:

The IPO refers to the first sale of stock by the listed company to the public on any recognized stock exchange.

If SpaceX is acquired by another company that is already public, this market will immediately resolve to "No."

The resolution source for this market is a consensus of credible reporting.

markets.question: Fed rate hike in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the upper bound of the target federal funds rate is increased at any point between January 1, 2026 and the Fed's December 2026 meeting, currently scheduled for December 8-9, 2026. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market may not resolve to "No" until the Fed has released its rate change decision following its December meeting.

The primary resolution source for this market will be the official website of the Federal Reserve (https://www.federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/openmarket.htm), however a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Polymarket traders price an 81% implied probability of no Federal Reserve rate hike in 2026, reflecting the FOMC's April 29 decision to hold the federal funds target range steady at 3.50%-3.75% amid heightened policy dissent (8-4 vote) and resilient economic data. March 2026 CPI accelerated to 3.3% year-over-year—up from 2.4%—driven by energy costs, while unemployment dipped to 4.3% with solid nonfarm payroll gains, signaling a balanced labor market without overheating. Fed Chair Powell described policy as near-neutral, with CME FedWatch futures implying a flat rate path near 3.6% through year-end. Key catalysts ahead include April CPI on May 12 and the June 17-18 FOMC meeting, where hotter prints could pressure odds.

markets.question: Will Matteo Berrettini win the 2026 Men's French Open?
markets.description:
The 2026 French Open is scheduled for May 18 - June 7, 2026.

This market will resolve to the player that wins the 2026 French Open Men’s Singles Tournament.

If at any point it becomes impossible for a listed player to win the 2026 French Open Men’s Singles Tournament per the rules of the tournament, the corresponding market will resolve to “No”.

If the 2026 French Open Men’s Singles Tournament is cancelled, postponed after July 31, 2026, or there is otherwise no winner declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the French Open (https://www.rolandgarros.com/en-us/); however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Carlos Alcaraz's withdrawal from the 2026 French Open due to a persistent right wrist injury—announced April 24 after pulling out of Madrid and Rome—has propelled Jannik Sinner to a dominant 69.5% implied probability as trader consensus favorite on Polymarket. The world No. 1 reclaimed the top ATP ranking with his first clay Masters 1000 title at Monte Carlo earlier this month, defeating Alcaraz in the final and showcasing improved patience and baseline control suited to Roland Garros' slower surface, where he fell to Alcaraz in last year's record-long final. Alexander Zverev (6.6%) follows as the top clay specialist with strong Madrid form, while Novak Djokovic (5.3%) faces shoulder injury doubts limiting his prep. Rising French hope Arthur Fils (3.4%) and teen sensation Rafael Jodar (3.0%) draw home support amid an open field.

markets.question: Will Starmer say "Shadow Secretary" during the next Prime Minister's Questions event?
markets.description:
Keir Starmer is scheduled to participate in the Prime Minister's Questions (PMQs) in the Commons Chamber in the Palace of Westminster on every Wednesday. (https://www.parliament.uk/visiting/visiting-and-tours/watch-committees-and-debates/prime-ministers-questions/).

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Keir Starmer says the listed term during the next Prime Minister's Question Time event he participates in. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No".

Any usage of the term regardless of context will count toward the resolution of this market.

Pluralization/possessive of the term will count toward the resolution of this market, however other forms will NOT count.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g. joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

If this market requires a specified number of mentions of a person’s first or last name, a full-name mention will count as one mention (e.g., if a market is about “Joe / Biden 5+ times,” a mention of “Joe Biden” will count once).

AI-generated audio or video will not count toward this market's resolution.

If no such Prime Minister's Question Time event happens by May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No". If Starmer ceases to be Prime Minister for any length of time by May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

This market is explicitly about scheduled events featuring Keir Starmer titled "Prime Minister's Question Time" (https://www.parallelparliament.co.uk/mp/keir-starmer/dept/cabinet-office/calendar). Speeches, events, or comments that occur outside of named, scheduled events will not qualify toward this market's resolution. If the event contains a Q&A, it will count toward the resolution of this market.

The resolution source will be video of the events. Only remarks which are broadcast or streamed live will count toward this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Prime Minister's Questions occurs every Wednesday at noon in the House of Commons when Parliament is sitting, with the next session scheduled for May 6 following the April 29 clash where Keir Starmer defended his administration against Kemi Badenoch's attacks on economy, energy policy, and welfare reforms. Trader consensus hinges on opposition grilling points drawn from fresh developments, including escalating Iran tensions, US President Trump's tariff threats involving Greenland, and Starmer's recent pledges for accelerated defence spending amid national security concerns. Starmer's weekend interviews emphasized closer EU economic ties and crisis comparisons to 2008 and Brexit, prompting 'Brexit betrayal' claims, while Speaker Lindsay Hoyle urged No. 10 to stay on-topic. Markets track verbatim mentions of these high-salience terms in Starmer's responses.

markets.question: Club Atlético de Madrid vs. RC Celta de Vigo: O/U 1.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming La Liga game between Club Atlético de Madrid and RC Celta de Vigo, scheduled for May 9 at 12:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Club Atlético de Madrid and RC Celta de Vigo combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on laliga.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Club Atlético de Madrid vs. RC Celta de Vigo - More Markets

eventMetadata.context_description: Atlético Madrid, entrenched in fourth place in the La Liga table after 33 matches, host sixth-placed RC Celta de Vigo on May 9 at Riyadh Air Metropolitano in a pivotal late-season clash for Champions League qualification. Los Colchoneros' recent form includes gritty home wins over Athletic Bilbao (3-2) and Getafe (1-0), bolstered by strong head-to-head dominance (19 wins in 30 meetings), though injuries to José Giménez (muscle), Dávid Hancko (ankle), and Pablo Barrios (thigh) temper squad depth. Celta, winless in their last five with a 1-0 loss to Barcelona, face away form woes despite a 1-1 draw at home earlier this season; key absences like Manu Fernández (muscle) add pressure amid their Europa League push. Home advantage and table stakes shape trader consensus.

eventMetadata.context_description: U.S. Rep. John James holds a polling edge over self-funding businessman Perry Johnson in Michigan's closely contested Republican gubernatorial primary per the Glengariff Group's April 25 survey (37% James, 20% Johnson among 500 likely voters, 22% undecided), yet trader consensus on Polymarket implies higher odds for Johnson amid his aggressive ad spending and strong straw poll showings like Saginaw County's March win. Former House Speaker Tom Leonard's April 23 withdrawal narrows the fragmented field—Mike Cox at 10%, Aric Nesbitt 7%—potentially consolidating support for leaders ahead of the August 4 primary and ongoing petition validations. High undecideds and Johnson's 2022 name recognition from a prior bid fuel market divergence from polling averages.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Milan be 24°C on May 3?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Malpensa Intl Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 3 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Malpensa Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/it/milan/LIMC.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

markets.question: Will Analilia Mejia win the NJ-11 Special Election by 40% or more?
markets.description:
The special election for the seat for New Jersey's 11th congressional district in the U.S. House of Representatives is currently scheduled to take place on April 16, 2026.

This market will resolve according to the margin of victory between the top two candidates in the specified election.

For the purpose of this market, the “margin of victory” is defined as the absolute difference between the percentages of valid votes received by the first-place and second-place candidates. Percentages of the valid votes received by each candidate will be determined by dividing the total number of valid votes each of the top two candidates receives by the sum of all valid votes cast in the election.

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher placed bracket.

If two or more candidates tie for the most valid votes in this election, and the tie is between two candidates listed, this market will resolve to the lowest margin bracket for the candidate whose listed last name comes first in alphabetical order. If the tie is between a listed candidate and an unlisted candidate, this market will resolve to the lowest margin bracket for the listed candidate. If the tie is between two or more unlisted candidates, this market will resolve to “Other.”

This market will resolve based on the official vote count once the count has been made official.

If the results of the specified election are not known definitively by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of official sources, including https://www.nj.gov/state/.

If a recount is initiated before the vote total has been made official, the market will remain open until the recount is completed and the vote is made official.

eventMetadata.context_description: Democrat Analilia Mejia's commanding 95% trader consensus for a 20-25% margin of victory in New Jersey's 11th Congressional District special election stems from April 16 vote tallies showing her defeating Republican Joe Hathaway 60.2% to 39.4%—a 20.8-point edge—with over 95% of ballots reported as of late April. This aligns with pre-election polls averaging Mejia +17 in the Democratic-leaning suburban district vacated by Gov. Mikie Sherrill, bolstered by strong progressive turnout and fundraising advantages. Mejia was sworn in last week, narrowing the GOP House majority. While final certification awaits, scenarios shifting odds include provisional ballot surges or a recount request dropping the margin under 20%, though no disputes have emerged.

For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts will count.

Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies which are recorded on the main feed will be counted by the tracker.

Recent US intelligence reports detailing severe injuries to successor Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei, including limited official access, have fueled expectations of subdued activity, contrasting the new @MKhamenei_ir account's May 1 cluster of nine posts marking Workers' and Teachers' Days. Earlier April markets resolved around 10-14 posts, but three weeks without updates signal trader caution on resumption.

markets.question: Will annual inflation increase by ≤3.1% in April?
markets.description:
This is a market about inflation over the 12-month period ending April 2026, before seasonal adjustment, as reported by the Bureau of Labor Statistics.

This market will resolve to the percentage change in the Consumer Price Index (CPI) over the 12-month period ending in April 2026 according to the monthly Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) report.

The resolution source for this market will be the BLS Consumer Price Index report released for April 2026 (https://www.bls.gov/bls/news-release/cpi.htm), currently scheduled to be released on May 12, 2026, at 8:30 AM ET. Resolution of this market will take place upon release of the aforementioned data.

Note: the resolution source for this market will be the official monthly BLS CPI news release, which reports inflation over 12-month periods to only one decimal point (e.g., 2.9%). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

If the BLS does not release the relevant figures on the scheduled date, this market may remain open up until the scheduled release time of the next CPI report (https://www.bls.gov/schedule). If the information is not released by that time, this market will resolve according to the figures of the most recent previous month with available data.

events.title: April Inflation US - Annual
events.description:
This is a market about inflation over the 12-month period ending April 2026, before seasonal adjustment, as reported by the Bureau of Labor Statistics.

This market will resolve to the percentage change in the Consumer Price Index (CPI) over the 12-month period ending in April 2026 according to the monthly Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) report.

The resolution source for this market will be the BLS Consumer Price Index report released for April 2026 (https://www.bls.gov/bls/news-release/cpi.htm), currently scheduled to be released on May 12, 2026, at 8:30 AM ET. Resolution of this market will take place upon release of the aforementioned data.

Note: the resolution source for this market will be the official monthly BLS CPI news release, which reports inflation over 12-month periods to only one decimal point (e.g., 2.9%). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

If the BLS does not release the relevant figures on the scheduled date, this market may remain open up until the scheduled release time of the next CPI report (https://www.bls.gov/schedule). If the information is not released by that time, this market will resolve according to the figures of the most recent previous month with available data.

eventMetadata.context_description: March 2026 CPI accelerated to 3.3% year-over-year—up sharply from February's 2.4%—driven by a 21.2% gasoline surge comprising most of the 10.9% energy index rise, prompting Polymarket traders to elevate April expectations. Trader consensus prices 3.7% at 37.4% implied probability, narrowly ahead of 3.8% at 29.1% in a closely contested race, outpacing economist forecasts near 3.3% but tracking Cleveland Fed nowcast of 3.56% amid persistent fuel pressures and sticky shelter inflation. Key differentiators include energy volatility versus favorable base effects from last April's low; core CPI holds near 2.6%. April data releases May 12.

markets.question: Will Microsoft have the second best AI model at the end of May 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the company that owns the model that has the second-highest arena rank based on the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on May 31, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" column under the "Text Arena | Overall" Leaderboard tab at https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control off will be used to resolve this market.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie remains, alphabetical order of company names as listed in this market group will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if the two models are tied by exact arena score, “Google” would be ranked ahead of “xAI”). This market will resolve based on the company that occupies second place under this ranking system.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and will resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

markets.question: O/U 1.5 Rounds
markets.description:
Each market will resolve to “Over” if the fight between Yaroslav Amosov and Joel Álvarez at UFC 328: Chimaev vs. Strickland, scheduled for May 9, 2026, lasts beyond the listed round threshold.

Each market will resolve to “Under” if the fight between Yaroslav Amosov and Joel Álvarez at UFC 328: Chimaev vs. Strickland, scheduled for May 9, 2026, does not last beyond the listed round threshold.

For example:

“Over 1.5 Rounds” will resolve “Yes” if the fight continues past the 2:30 mark of Round 2.

“Under 1.5 Rounds” will resolve “Yes” if the fight ends before the 2:30 mark of Round 2.

If the fight ends exactly at the threshold (e.g., 2:30 of Round 2 for a 1.5 line), it will resolve “50-50.”

If the bout is not scored, postponed beyond May 23, 2026, or canceled, all options will resolve “50-50.”

The resolution source for this market will be official information from the UFC.

events.title: UFC 328: Yaroslav Amosov vs. Joel Álvarez (Welterweight, Prelims)
events.description:
This market will resolve to "Yaroslav Amosov" if Yaroslav Amosov is officially declared the winner of the fight against Joel Álvarez at UFC 328: Chimaev vs. Strickland, scheduled for May 9, 2026.

It will resolve to "Joel Álvarez" if Joel Álvarez is officially declared the winner.

If the fight is declared a draw or technical draw, ruled a No Contest, not scored, canceled, or postponed beyond May 23, 2026, this market will resolve "50-50."

The resolution source for this market will be official information from the UFC.

eventMetadata.context_description: Former Bellator welterweight champion Yaroslav Amosov (29-1, 1-0 UFC), fresh off a dominant first-round anaconda choke submission of Neil Magny in his December debut, collides with surging Joel Álvarez (23-3, 8-2 UFC) on the UFC 328 welterweight prelims in Newark on May 9. Álvarez, who recently shifted to 170 pounds following a successful welterweight debut, leverages his 6'3" height, 80-inch reach, and elite BJJ for back-take submissions against Amosov's relentless wrestling pressure and top control. No injuries reported with weigh-ins looming; trader consensus reflects their grappling pedigrees and recent momentum, though Álvarez's striking edge and Amosov's takedown consistency heighten upset potential in this stylistic barnburner.

markets.question: Will Silver (SI) settle over $75 on the final trading day of June 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the official CME settlement price for the Active Month of Silver futures on the final trading day of June 2026 is higher than the listed price. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No".

For CME Silver (SI) futures contracts, the Active Month is the nearest of CME's designated delivery-cycle months (March, May, July, September, December) that is not the spot month. The Active Month becomes a non-active month effective on its First Position Date, at which point the next eligible contract month becomes the Active Month.

Only the Active Month's official settlement price published by CME Group will be considered. Intraday trades, highs, lows, bids, offers, midpoint values, or indicative prices do not count.

Note that the settlement price may differ from the last traded price. CME's methodology to determine the settlement price can vary by commodity and contract.

Only days during June on which CME publishes an official settlement price for the Active Month will be included. Days without settlement prices (weekends, holidays, or market closures) are ignored.

This market will resolve based on the settlement price as it appears on the CME settlement page at the time it is first published for that trading day, regardless of any later corrections or updates.

The resolution source for this market is the CME Group website — specifically, the daily "Settlement" price for the Active Month of Silver (SI) futures.

eventMetadata.context_description: Silver futures (SI) for June 2026 trade near $75.63 per ounce, closely tracking spot prices around $75.40 amid trader consensus pricing a tight range for end-June settlement between $70-$90, reflecting persistent supply deficits surpassing 46 million ounces annually and robust industrial demand from solar photovoltaics and electronics. Prices surged to a weekly high of $76.98 last week, fueled by falling oil benchmarks and U.S. dollar depreciation, before consolidating as March 2026 CPI confirmed sticky 3.3% headline inflation, tempering Federal Reserve rate cut expectations. Key catalysts ahead include the May 7 FOMC meeting for updated dot plot guidance, April CPI release on May 15, and June nonfarm payrolls, which could sway dollar strength and risk appetite for precious metals.

markets.question: U.S. enacts AI safety bill before 2027?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if a bill that includes at least one of the following provisions is signed into federal law in the United States  by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. 

- Prohibition on Creation or Release: Forbids the creation or release of specific AI systems or models.

- Training Restrictions: Sets limits on how AI systems can be trained, such as restricting access to previously available training data or imposing a maximum limit on the number of parameters used for training.

- Usage Restrictions:  Prevents AI systems from being used in certain applications, such as interacting with customers, interfacing with other applications, or performing actions on the web.

- Human-in-the-Loop Requirements: Requires AI systems to include mechanisms ensuring human oversight or involvement in their operation.

Otherwise this market will resolve to "No". 

The resolution source will be official U.S. federal government (e.g., Congress.gov) however a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

- Usage Restrictions:  Prevents AI systems from being used in certain applications, such as interacting with customers, interfacing with other applications, or performing actions on the web.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus reflects a 72.5% implied probability for "No" on U.S. enactment of an AI safety bill before 2027, driven by the absence of federal legislation meeting strict criteria like prohibitions on AI model creation or release, training compute limits, usage restrictions, or mandatory human-in-the-loop requirements. The bipartisan American Leadership in AI Act, introduced April 27, 2026, advances AI Safety Institute codification and research funding but lacks these safeguards, stalling in committees amid partisan divides in the 119th Congress. President Trump's March 20 National AI Legislative Framework prioritizes innovation, child protections, and state preemption over comprehensive regulation, with states like Colorado enacting narrower laws. Lame-duck breakthroughs remain possible but uncertain.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket heavily favors Anthropic at 83% implied probability for topping the LMSYS Chatbot Arena leaderboard (Style Control On) by end of May, driven by Claude Opus 4.7's mid-April release that propelled it to the #1 spot across Text and Code Arenas with a commanding 1505 Elo score and top-four dominance. This agentic large language model excels in real-world coding tasks like building live apps, outpacing rivals by 37-130 Elo points per Arena.ai updates. Google's Gemini 3.1 Pro trails at 15% with strengths in reasoning benchmarks but lacks the vote momentum to close the gap soon. OpenAI's GPT-5.5 and others lag far behind; watch for potential May releases from Google DeepMind or xAI that could challenge the lead before resolution.

markets.question: US x Cuba military clash in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if there is a military encounter between the military forces of the United States and Cuba between market creation and December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

A "military encounter" is defined as any incident involving the use of force such as missile strikes, artillery fire, exchange of gunfire, or other forms of direct military engagement between US and Cuban military forces. Non-violent actions, such as warning shots, artillery fire into uninhabited areas, or missile launches that land in territorial waters or pass through airspace, will not qualify for a "Yes" resolution. Intentional ship ramming that results in significant damage to (e.g., a hole in the hull) or the sinking of a military ship by another will count toward a "Yes" resolution, however minor damage (scrapes, dents) will not.

Note: the United States Coast Guard is considered part of the United States military, and the Cuban Border Guard is considered part of the Cuban military.

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting.

events.description:

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus slightly favors no US-Cuba military clash in 2026 at 55.5%, reflecting heightened rhetoric and contingency planning offset by ongoing diplomacy and resource constraints. President Trump's May 2 remarks joking that the US Navy could "take over" Cuba "almost immediately" post-Iran operations, coupled with a May 1 executive order imposing new sanctions on Cuban repression and threats, prompted Cuban President Díaz-Canel's denunciation of "unprecedented" US military escalation. Pentagon planning ramped up in mid-April per reports, following a Senate vote blocking limits on executive military action, yet no deployments have occurred amid April 21 Havana talks seeking energy blockade relief. With US focus on Iran ceasefire and high intervention costs, traders see limited action as more likely than outright clash before year-end.

markets.question: Will Jalen Duren win the 2026 Eastern Conference Finals MVP?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the player who wins the 2026 Eastern Conference Finals Most Valuable Player award for the 2026 NBA Playoffs.

In the event of a tie, this market will resolve according to the official winner as determined by NBA rules. If multiple winners are announced then this market will resolve to the player whose listed last name comes first alphabetically.

If the 2026 NBA Playoffs are cancelled, postponed after June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, or there is otherwise no winner declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from the NBA; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Philadelphia's dramatic Game 7 road win over Boston on May 2—erasing a 3-1 deficit—advanced Tyrese Maxey and set up an Eastern Conference semifinals clash with Jalen Brunson and the Knicks, injecting uncertainty into the path to the ECF. Today's pivotal Game 7s pit Cade Cunningham's top-seeded Pistons against Paolo Banchero's Magic and Brandon Ingram/Scottie Barnes' Raptors versus Donovan Mitchell/Evan Mobley's Cavaliers, with all series showcasing playoff parity after grueling first-round battles. This star-studded gauntlet, featuring Detroit's regular-season dominance and Toronto's upset potential, keeps trader-implied probabilities tightly bunched around 38-43% for Cunningham, Tatum, Ingram, and Barnes, underscoring no dominant ECF frontrunner amid shifting matchups and momentum swings.

markets.question: Bitcoin Up or Down - May 4, 6:40AM-6:45AM ET
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the Bitcoin price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the BTC/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/btc-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream BTC/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

If at any point it becomes impossible for a listed participant to named as the champion of WNBA for the 2026 season per the rules of WNBA (e.g., participant is eliminated), the corresponding market will resolve to "No".

If multiple teams are declared winners, this market will resolve in favor of the team whose listed name comes first alphabetically.

If this event is cancelled, postponed after November 14, 11:59 PM ET, or a champion has not been declared within this timeframe, this market will resolve to "Other".

The resolution source will be official information from the WNBA: however a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: New York Liberty lead trader consensus at 27% implied probability to win the 2026 WNBA championship after re-signing core stars Breanna Stewart and Sabrina Ionescu while adding three-time All-Star Satou Sabally in free agency, bolstering their 2024 title-winning depth amid a competitive 15-team field with expansion sides Golden State Valkyries, Toronto Tempo, and Portland Fire. Indiana Fever sit close at 16% on the breakout trio of Caitlin Clark, Aliyah Boston's new extension, and Kelsey Mitchell's scoring prowess, assuming health sustains their momentum. Defending champions Las Vegas Aces hold 15.5% behind A'ja Wilson's supermax re-signing and dynasty experience, but odds slipped as rivals upgraded; Atlanta Dream's 11% reflects strong offseason grades via key acquisitions, setting a wide-open postseason path influenced by early-season form, injuries, and playoff matchups.

markets.question: Will SpaceX's market cap be between $1.8T and $2.0T at market close on IPO day?
markets.description:
This market will resolve based on SpaceX's market capitalization at the closing price on its first day of trading.

If no SpaceX IPO occurs by December 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "No IPO before 2028".

Market capitalization expresses the monetary value of a company’s outstanding shares, stated in its pricing currency. It is calculated as the number of shares outstanding multiplied by the closing share price on the first trading day.

If the relevant value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

Resolution will be based on the primary exchange’s official listing page. In the event that the relevant figure is not displayed, another reliable source will be used.

In the event of an interruption in the course of the normal trading session on SpaceX’s first day of trading (e.g., a circuit breaker or half-day), the market will resolve according to the official closing price of the abbreviated session. If no such official closing price is published, the market will resolve according to the next trading day on which an official closing price is published, treating that as the first day of trading for purposes of this market.

eventMetadata.context_description: SpaceX's confidential SEC filing for a 2026 IPO on April 1 has propelled trader consensus toward a blockbuster valuation, with 54% implied probability on 2.0T+ market cap reflecting targets exceeding $2 trillion amid Starlink's explosive satellite broadband growth and Starship's rapid reusability milestones. Recent Starship updates, including V4's targeted 10,000 metric tons of liftoff thrust—triple Saturn V power—and expansions like Papua New Guinea service, underscore operational scaling and revenue potential from high-bandwidth V3 satellites. Lower brackets like 1.8T–2.0T (13%) account for pricing dynamics, while "No IPO before 2028" odds at 3.8% have plunged post-filing. Traders eye the S-1 prospectus drop around May 15–22 and June/July listing for resolution catalysts, though FAA approvals and Musk's dual-class control pose risks to premium pricing.

eventMetadata.context_description: Cameron Young commands a commanding six-shot lead at 15-under par entering the final round of the Cadillac Championship on Trump National Doral's challenging Blue Monster course, where his hot start through 54 holes—bolstered by strong ball-striking and par-5 scoring—has solidified trader consensus on frontrunners securing top-10 spots. Scottie Scheffler and Si Woo Kim lurk at nine-under in a tie for second after charging up the leaderboard Saturday, while early contenders like Jordan Spieth maintain contention amid a star-studded signature event field. No significant injuries or withdrawals have disrupted the top since Jake Knapp's pre-tournament thumb sprain exit; mild Miami weather favors aggressive play on the long layout, though final-round volatility on exposed greens could allow mid-pack surges for top-10 value.

markets.question: Spread: CA Platense (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Primera División Argentina game, scheduled for March 6 at 3:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "CA Platense" if CA Platense win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Estudiantes de La Plata".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on ligaprofesional.ar. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: CA Platense vs. Estudiantes de La Plata - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Primera División Argentina game, scheduled for March 6 at 3:00 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Estudiantes de La Plata hold second place in the Liga Profesional Apertura table with an impressive defensive record, conceding only nine goals across 10 matches, bolstering trader consensus for their away challenge at Platense's Estadio Ciudad de Vicente López on May 3. Platense sit 10th amid a mid-table campaign hampered by injuries to key defender Gonzalo Goñi (Achilles tendon rupture, out until August), Iván Gómez (hamstring), Héctor Bobadilla (bruise), and others like Franco Minerva (strain). Estudiantes also miss Santiago Arzamendia (cruciate ligament tear) and José Sosa (Achilles issues), but their form edges the matchup. The sides' prior March fixture was postponed, following Estudiantes' 2-1 Trofeo de Campeones win in December.

markets.question: Will Donald Trump post 160-179 Truth Social posts from May 5 to May 12, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the number of times Donald Trump (@realDonaldTrump), posts on Truth Social between May 5, 12:00 PM ET and May 12, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts will count.

Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies which are recorded on the main feed will be counted by the tracker.

Deleted posts will count as long as they remain available long enough to be captured by the tracker (~5 minutes).

The resolution source for this market is the "Post Counter" figure for posts found at https://xtracker.polymarket.com. Individual posts can be viewed by clicking "Export Data". If the tracker does not update correctly in accordance with the rules, Truth Social itself may be used as a secondary resolution source.

markets.question: Will "Dandelion - Ella Langley" be the Billboard 200 #1 album for the week of May 9?
markets.description:
Billboard updates the Billboard 200 albums chart each Tuesday (with adjusted release schedules on some holiday weeks), reflecting data from the previous week (Friday-Thursday). Each Billboard chart is then dated “Week of (date of the upcoming Saturday)”.

This market will resolve according to the number 1 album on the Billboard 200 chart dated “Week of May 9, 2026”.

This market will resolve as soon as the relevant chart is published. If the Billboard 200 chart for the specified week is not published within 14 calendar days of the expected release date, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The resolution source for this market will be the Billboard 200 chart for the specified week, published on the Billboard website (https://www.billboard.com/charts/billboard-200/) or through other official Billboard channels.
